---
title: "Plot Template"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("scripts", "load_functions.R"))
trigger <- load_trigger_functions()
```

```{r}
# Example:
# con <- trigger$connect_trigger_db()
# data_long <- trigger$read_trigger_tables(
#   con = con,
#   granularity = "hourly",
#   output = "long"
# )
```

```{r}
# Build your plot here
# p <- ggplot(...)
```

```{r}
# Save final plots in the outputs/ folder
# ggsave(
#   filename = here::here("outputs", "plot_example.png"),
#   plot = p,
#   width = 10,
#   height = 6,
#   dpi = 300
# )
```
